title: [Epic] Refactor AGENTS.md Routing & Modularize Agent Instructions
body: The current `AGENTS.md` file contains monolithic rules that are easily lost in the agent's context due to the cognitive load of execution. We need to refactor `AGENTS.md` into a routing index and modularize distinct policies (e.g., GitHub PR rules, EDR constraints, Documentation rules) into dedicated, contextual files or skills within `.agents/` to improve salience.

issues.title: Refactor AGENTS.md into a central routing index
issues.body: Remove monolithic rule blocks from `AGENTS.md` and rewrite it to serve purely as a 'table of contents' or routing pattern that signposts to other `.md` files in the `.agents/` folder.

issues.title: Extract GitHub Issue Sync and PR workflow rules into a dedicated skill
issues.body: Move the GitHub issue workflow and PR state management rules (including the mandatory `Closes #<issue>` rule) into a dedicated `.agents/skills/github-workflow/SKILL.md`. This ensures the rules are explicitly loaded when the agent is performing GitHub operations.

issues.title: Extract SentinelOne EDR and Timestamp rules into dedicated modules
issues.body: Extract the SentinelOne EDR execution constraints and the Global Documentation Timestamps rules into their own modular `.md` files inside the `.agents/` folder, referenced by the new `AGENTS.md` index.
